title: carex asturica
intro: Carex asturica, also known as Asturian sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Carex asturica include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its expectorant properties, which can aid in the removal of mucus from the lungs. Carex asturica is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be made into a decoction by steeping the plant's roots in hot water.
